questions.question: A shirt originally costs $40. It is on sale for 25% off. What is the sale price?
A restaurant bill is $50 before tax. The tax rate is 8%. What is the total bill including tax?
Last year, a company had 200 employees. This year, it has 240 employees. What is the percent increase in the number of employees?
A coat costs $80 and you want to leave a 15% tip. How much is the tip?
A book is marked down by 20% from its original price of $25. What is the new price?
A video game costs $60 after a 10% discount. What was the original price?
questions.explanation: If the price is discounted by 10%, the customer pays 90% of the original. So 0.90 × original = $60. Original = $60 ÷ 0.90 ≈ $66.67.
